title: chore(deps): update dependency babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types to v0.4.13 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types](https://github.com/oliviertassinari/babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types) from `v0.4.10` to `v0.4.13`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v0.4.11`](https://github.com/oliviertassinari/babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types/releases/v0.4.11)

##### Fixes / Enhancements

- fix(babel): Support latest beta version of babel 7 (#​131) @​danez
- [core] Use preset-env instead of es2015 (#​128) @​oliviertassinari
- [core] Upgrade dependencies (#​132) @​oliviertassinari

---

### [`v0.4.12`](https://github.com/oliviertassinari/babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types/releases/v0.4.12)

##### Fixes / Enhancements

- core(babel): upgrade to @​babel latest beta (#​133) @​danez

---

### [`v0.4.13`](https://github.com/oliviertassinari/babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types/releases/v0.4.13)

##### Fixes / Enhancements

- Add a classNameMatchers option to make Component resolution flexible (#​135) @​vieron
- [core] Upgrade the dependencies (#​136)

---

</details>
